---
title: "“Children’s literature of the last century: I. - Nursery books of the eighteenth century.” by Miss Yonge"
---

## “Children’s literature of the last century: I. - Nursery books of the eighteenth century.” by Miss Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1869
**Genre:** Non-fiction: criticism
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** Not reprinted in volume form

### Notes

An early instance of CMY allowing her name to appear, though not in the form she ultimately adopted.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
